description: A wandering sage rests within the old northern sanctum, carrying wisdom from distant lands. Cross the open ruins to seek their counsel.
customIntroduction: The ruins stretch out before you under an open sky. Collapsed towers and a crumbling central hall stand between you and the northern sanctum, where a lone figure sits in quiet contemplation. The wandering sage has made camp here, far from prying ears.
customContext: Social encounter in an outdoor ruin. The player approaches from the south across open rubble-strewn ground. The sage (wanderer NPC) is seated inside the northern sanctum — a partially intact stone chamber at the far north of the ruins. The setting is isolated and peaceful; no enemies are present. The sage is knowledgeable, enigmatic, and willing to talk, but expects the player to make the journey across the ruins to reach them.
